word: G3110 - Μακεδών - Makedṓn - mak-ed'-ohn - Of Macedonia

sections.paragraph:
- Original: Μακεδών

- Transliteration: Makedon

- Phonetic: mak-ed'-ohn

- Definition:

1. a Macedonian

- Origin: of uncertain derivation

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of uncertain derivation; a Macedon (Macedonian) that is inhabitant of Macedonia: - of Macedonia Macedonian.
